query.parameters: level=campaign&fields=account_id, account_name, account_currency, campaign_id, campaign_name, actions, action_values&date_preset=last_30d&time_increment=1&filtering=[{field: 'action_type', operator: 'ANY', value: ['offsite_conversion.fb_pixel_purchase', 'link_click']}]
id, url_tags, object_story_spec,  account_id, adlabels,ad_id ,fb_content, platform_customizations, tracking_specs

query.fields:
insights.level(ad)
    .action_breakdowns(action_type)
    .time_range({'since':'2025-04-01','until':'2025-04-30'})
    .time_increment(1)
    .attribution_windows(['7d_click'])
{
    ad_id,
    ad_name,
    adset_id,
    adset_name,
    campaign_id,
    campaign_name,
    date_start,
    date_stop,
    impressions,
    clicks,
    spend,
    reach,
    ctr,
    cpc,
    cpm,
    cpp,
    objective,
    optimization_goal,
    frequency,
    unique_clicks,
    unique_ctr,
    cost_per_unique_click,
    actions{
        action_type,
        value
    },
    action_values{
        action_type,
        value
    },
    cost_per_action_type{
        action_type,
        value
    },
    purchase_roas{
        action_type,
        value
    },
    website_purchase_roas{
        action_type,
        value
    }
}
